fruit.name: Hito Hito no Mi, Nika model
fruit.description: Hito Hito no Mi, Nika model, is a Mythical Zoan Demon Fruit that enables its user to transform into Nika, the "God of the Sun".

fruit.name: Hito Hito no Mi, Nika model
fruit.description: Hito Hito no Mi, Nika model, is a Mythical Zoan Demon Fruit that enables its user to transform into Nika, the "God of the Sun".

fruit.name: Pyro-Fruit
fruit.description: the body of the eater is transformed into fire. It can therefore create powerful explosions and control ambient temperatures. It can also use its fire to propel itself and move much faster. However, fire is no match for magma.

fruit.name: Fruit of Trembling
fruit.description: Enables the user to create seismic waves, causing earthquakes or cracks (even in the surrounding air) that destroy anything within their zone of effect. The strength of these waves varies according to the user's desire, and they can be disproportionately large. The power of this fruit is so great that it can also cause tsunamis or abysses. Seismic waves can cover weapons to increase the power of their blows tenfold.

fruit.name: Fruit of the Shadow
fruit.description: Allows its user to control shadows. He can cut the shadows of anyone with a pair of scissors, and the shadows thus removed can be locked into inert bodies, giving rise to zombies possessing the combat techniques of the person to whom the shadow belonged. If shadows are enclosed in the body of a living being, they can only remain for a short time, depending on the latter's mental strength. For example, its user has consumed up to 1000 of them. It should also be noted that the user can use his own shadow and make it tangible. He can therefore use his shadow to teleport or protect himself from physical attacks.

fruit.name: Fruit of Darkness
fruit.description: the body of the eater is transformed into darkness. It becomes capable of altering gravity so as to attract and absorb just about anything in a 'black hole' and then release it. It can also cancel the powers of other demon fruit users when it touches them. Moreover, it is the only Logia that cannot avoid physical blows, so its user becomes highly sensitive to pain. It can also absorb the power of its owner's demon fruit, as Marshall D. Teach will do with Whitebeard.

fruit.name: Fruit of Fragmentation
fruit.description: Allows you to separate your body into several parts and levitate them. The parts can fly in an area 200 meters in diameter around the feet. The feet, on the other hand, cannot levitate (although they can walk). This power makes the user immune to sharp weapons. Any part of the user will nevertheless remain sensitive to the pain felt by other detached body parts.

fruit.name: Fruit Glisse-Glisse
fruit.description: Smoothes the user's skin, making it more beautiful. What's more, the skin becomes ultra-slick, deflecting objects touching the body.

fruit.name: Pyro-Fruit
fruit.description: the body of the eater is transformed into fire. It can therefore create powerful explosions and control ambient temperatures. It can also use its fire to propel itself and move much faster. However, fire is no match for magma.

fruit.name: Fruit of the Spring
fruit.description: Transform parts of your body into springs that bounce back at impressive speed, increasing the power of your blows.

fruit.name: Ramollo fruit
fruit.description: Emits a ray that slows down the movement of any mass for 30 seconds. This ray can be reflected by a mirror, and the user is not immune to its effects.

fruit.name: Fruit of the Scalpel
fruit.description: This fruit allows the eater to create a sphere in which he can do anything from interchanging one thing with another to extending the range of his sword strokes. It can also cut up its victims without killing them, or cancel the gravity of anything in the sphere. Its user can even remove a person's heart while leaving them alive, or swap the personalities of several people. This fruit is considered the "ultimate demon fruit" because of its unique ability to grant another person eternal youth in exchange for the user's life.

fruit.name: Ciro-Fruit
fruit.description: Produces a fast-hardening wax that can be molded into any shape. This wax becomes very resistant when hardened, but remains just as vulnerable to heat as normal wax. Note that it can block most poisons.

fruit.name: Kilo-Kilo Fruit
fruit.description: Allows the user's mass to be varied between a featherweight and 10 tons. Note that the user's volume does not change when he changes his mass.

fruit.name: Passion fruit
fruit.description: Allows its possessor to use love as a lethal weapon through a variety of means. These techniques are designed to petrify people or objects, and are all heart-shaped (rays, piercing kisses, kicks, etc.). This power only works on people with an attraction (however slight) for the user. When the user reverses the process, the victim has no memory of the time spent petrified.

fruit.name: Fruit of the Barrier
fruit.description: Enables its user to generate almost invisible barriers to deflect or block any attack. These barriers can take on a wide range of shapes (racket, stairs, etc.).

crew.name: The crew of the Moon Crescent
The crew of the Moon Crescent
The crew of the Moon Crescent
The crew of the Lion d'Or

fruit.name: Fruit of the Pachyderm, Mammoth version
fruit.description: whoever eats it can turn into a mammoth. It increases the strength and length of its owner in an exceptional way. The hardness of its skin also gives it a certain resistance to physical attack.

fruit.name: Fruit of Souls
fruit.description: Allows you to manipulate the souls of human beings as you wish. The user can introduce a soul into an object or animal to bring it to life and humanize it, i.e. give it consciousness and the gift of speech. These beings are called 'Homies'. The user can also divide his or her own soul into fragments that live on as avatars of the fruit eater. The main role of these avatars is to harvest fragments of life from living beings and redistribute them to their owners. People with no fear of death or psychic powers are more resistant to this fruit.

fruit.name: Fruit du Séquestre
fruit.description: Enables the user to imprison opponents by coming into contact with them. These constrictive bonds are made of a rapidly hardening substance.

fruit.name: Fulguro-Fruit
fruit.description: the body of the eater is transformed into lightning. It can therefore move at lightning speed and strike anything except non-conductive elements such as rubber. He can create powerful thunderstorms or spheres of lightning. By combining Haki with its lightning, its user can hear things from over 1 kilometer away. He can also revive himself if he falls unconscious.

crew.name: The crew of the Lion d'Or

fruit.name: Floating Fruit
fruit.description: It enables its user to lift objects by controlling gravity. Since its user has swords for legs, he can also fly. (Although this fruit appeared in a movie, its use was demonstrated in chapter 0 of One Piece explaining Shiki's escape from Impel Down prison).
